creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 170756
Update diff

Hi,

I've been contacted by the ndpi and ntop author to help him bring ntopng back to the FreeBSD ports tree.

This update I'm sending in this PR is a requirement to import a newer version of it to the tree. You can get a copy of the ntopng port I'm going to commit at [1]

While sending this update for your approval I'd also ask you if you would mind handing me maintainership of the net/ndpi port. I'd like to maintain both ndpi and the forthcoming ntopng ports.

Thanks in advance.


[1] http://www.madpilot.net/~mad/ntop.txz
